snapshot_retention.label: Snapshot retention
snapshot_retention.description: Older snapshots are pruned automatically when this limit is reached.

hotkey.title: Hotkey
hotkey.description: Global hotkey to summon Macroscope from anywhere. Activation arrives in a future update.
hotkey.inactive_note: Currently inactive — values saved but not registered with the system.

project_artifacts.title: Project artifacts
project_artifacts.description: Controls how build artifacts (node_modules, target/, .venv, etc.) are classified during analysis.
project_artifacts.active_threshold_description: Projects touched within this many days are considered active (low severity).
project_artifacts.stale_threshold_description: Projects untouched beyond this many days are considered stale (high severity). Between active and stale thresholds is idle (medium).
project_artifacts.min_size_description: Artifact groups smaller than this are not surfaced as findings.

safety.title: Safety
safety.allowed_paths_description: Macroscope can only move items to Trash from these locations. This list updates automatically based on your Project Roots above.
safety.denied_paths_description: These locations are never touched, regardless of any other rule.
safety.audit_log_description: Every move-to-Trash operation is recorded for review.

about.title: About
about.build_info: Macroscope v{{version}} · Built for macOS (Apple Silicon)

developer.title: Developer
developer.description: Deletes all snapshots and analysis results, resets all settings, and triggers the first-run wizard on next launch. API keys in macOS Keychain are preserved.
developer.reset_dialog_description: This deletes all snapshots, clears project roots, resets the AI provider, and triggers onboarding on next launch. API keys in macOS Keychain are preserved. This cannot be undone. Continue?

always_scanned.title: Always-scanned locations
always_scanned.description: Macroscope audits these locations on every snapshot. This list is fixed — per-probe toggles are out of scope by design.

project_roots.title: Project Roots
project_roots.description: Macroscope cleans build artifacts (node_modules, target, .venv, .gradle, etc.) from these directories. Auto-detected on first launch — edit anytime.
project_roots.empty: No project directories configured. Add one to enable build artifact cleanup.

errors.ForbiddenPrefix: Path is inside a protected system location

ai_provider.title: AI Provider
ai_provider.api_key_stored: Key stored in macOS Keychain · enter a new value to replace

errors.keychain_denied: Could not save API key — keychain access was denied. Open the Permissions section to grant access.

section_permissions.title: Permissions
section_permissions.description: System permissions Macroscope needs to operate

disk.label: Disk & storage
disk.description: Volume capacity for / and the total size of well-known cache and data locations. Size totals only; per-file detail comes from Large files.

processes.label: Running processes
processes.description: All processes currently consuming significant memory (≥ 10 MB RSS).

network.label: Network listeners
network.description: All ports accepting inbound connections and active outbound TCP sessions.

persistence.label: Persistence & login items
persistence.description: Programs configured to run automatically at login or system boot.

users.label: User accounts
users.description: Local macOS user accounts registered with the system.

kernel.label: Kernel extensions
kernel.description: Third-party kernel extensions currently loaded into the kernel.

apps.label: Installed apps & leftovers
apps.description: Installed .app bundles and leftover data in ~/Library from uninstalled apps. Cache directories overlap with Disk — Disk shows totals, this lists orphaned leftovers.

large_files.label: Large files
large_files.description: Files ≥ 50 MB in common home folders, grouped by type and recency.
